findings.evidence_span: UPLOAD_ROOT / filename writes a user name into /public/uploads
findings.recommended_fix: Generate server-side names and store outside public executable roots.

findings.evidence_span: filename.endswith without MIME or magic-byte validation
findings.recommended_fix: Validate MIME, signature, size, and extension together.

findings.evidence_span: audit_log_retention_days is empty and handlers write no audit event
